questions: What is the specific species identified in the diagnostic test result (e.g., P. vivax, P. falciparum, Mixed)?
Is the microscopy result available within 24 hours? (Yes/No)
If microscopy is not available within 24 hours, was a monovalent RDT used? (Yes/No)
If microscopy is not available within 24 hours, was a bivalent RDT used? (Yes/No)
What is the Annual Parasite Incidence (API) in the patient's area?
What percentage of P. falciparum infections were present in the area in the last 3 years (Pf %)?
Is the patient located in North Eastern states? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have Glucose-6-phosphate dehydrogenase (G6PD) deficiency? (Yes/No)
Is the patient under 1 year old? (Yes/No)
